data.name: app_key
data.desc: Unique app ID issued by ICBU Open Platform console when you apply for an app category

data.name: timestamp
data.desc: The time stamp of the request e.g. 1517820392000 (which translates to 5 February 2018 08:46:32) with less than 7200s difference from UTC time

data.name: sign_method
data.desc: The HMAC hash algorithm you are using to calculate your signature

data.name: sign
data.desc: Part of the authentication process that is used for identifying and verifying who is sending a request (click here for details)

children.mappingValue: import java.util.Map; import com.taobao.top.lbac.tip.internal.impl.actions.MixUtil; public class script { /** * @param ctx 系统上下文参数 * @param rsp 表示上一级API出参，通常为一个map */ public Object execute(Map ctx, Object rsp) { return MixUtil.mixIcbuProdectId(rsp.get("id"),ctx.get("app_key")); } }

children.desc: 产品负责人显示名，由firstname和lastname拼接组成
/**      * SKU价      */     SKU_PRICE("sku_price"),     /**      * 阶梯价      */     LADDER_PRICE("ladder_price"),     /**      * fob价: 单一区间fob价      */     FOB_PRICE("fob_price");

requestCodes.code:
client = IopApiClient::Client.new(url, appkey, appSecret)
request = IopApiClient::Request.new('alibaba.icbu.product.get')
request.add_api_parameter("product_id", "AAFc6e0tAOFRf_-b7UlVDG5b")
request.add_api_parameter("language", "ENGLISH")
response = client.execute(request, accessToken)
puts response.success?
puts response.body

client = iop.IopClient(url, appkey ,appSecret)
request = iop.IopRequest('alibaba.icbu.product.get')
request.add_api_param('product_id', 'AAFc6e0tAOFRf_-b7UlVDG5b')
request.add_api_param('language', 'ENGLISH')
response = client.execute(request, access_token)
print(response.type)
print(response.body)

children.desc: 水印位置，在中间(center)或者在底部(bottom)

children.name: sale_type
children.desc: 销售方式，按件卖(normal)或者按批卖(batch)

children.name: batch_number
children.desc: 每批数量，当sale_type=batch时生效，范围是1-99999

children.name: price
children.desc: 价格，单位是美元，精确到小数点后两位，范围是0.01-9999999.00

children.name: package_size
children.desc: 尺寸，单位是厘米，长宽高范围是1-9999999

children.name: volume
children.desc: 体积，单位是立方厘米，范围是1-9999999

children.name: weight
children.desc: 重量，单位是kg，精确到小数点后三位，范围是0.01-9999999.000

children.name: min_order_quantity
children.desc: 最小起订量，必须是batch_number的整数倍，范围是1-99999

children.name: handling_time
children.desc: 备货期，单位是天，范围是1-60
